properties.description: Notifies business stakeholders when the EU Population Data Ingestion pipeline completes or fails. Triggered by a pipeline webhook, routes alerts to Microsoft Teams and email, logs every run to SharePoint, and raises a Planner task for failures.

Pipeline_webhook.description: Receives an HTTP POST from the Fabric pipeline when the EU Population Data Ingestion run finishes. The payload contains the pipeline name, run status, start/end times, and any error message.

Parse_pipeline_result.description: Extracts the pipeline name, status, start time, end time, run ID, and error message from the incoming webhook payload.

Check_run_status.description: Routes the notification to the success or failure branch based on the pipeline run status reported in the webhook payload.

Post_success_to_Teams.description: Posts a success card to the Analytics Notifications Teams channel so stakeholders know the population data is ready.

body.messageBody:
✅ EU Population Data Refresh Complete
Pipeline: @{body('Parse_pipeline_result')?['pipelineName']}
Finished: @{body('Parse_pipeline_result')?['endTime']}
Run ID: @{body('Parse_pipeline_result')?['runId']}

The Population table is up to date and reports are ready for use.

Send_success_email.description: Emails the analytics stakeholders list to confirm the latest EU population projection data is available in the reporting lakehouse.

body.Subject: EU Population Data Refreshed — @{body('Parse_pipeline_result')?['endTime']}

Post_failure_alert_to_Teams.description: Posts an urgent failure alert to the Data Engineering Teams channel with the error details so the on-call engineer can begin investigation immediately.

body.messageBody:
❌ EU Population Data Refresh Failed
Pipeline: @{body('Parse_pipeline_result')?['pipelineName']}
Error: @{body('Parse_pipeline_result')?['errorMessage']}
Run ID: @{body('Parse_pipeline_result')?['runId']}

Please investigate immediately.

Send_failure_alert_email.description: Sends a high-priority alert email to the data engineering lead and on-call engineer with the full error details.

body.Subject: ⚠️ ALERT: EU Population Data Pipeline Failed

Create_incident_task.description: Creates a Planner task in the Data Engineering Incidents bucket so the failure is tracked and assigned for resolution.

Log_run_to_SharePoint.description: Records the pipeline run outcome — success or failure — in the Data Ops SharePoint list so there is a permanent audit trail of all refresh attempts.
